steps.title: Track the research timeline
steps.content: The passage moves from archaeologists knowing about the Nazca lines since the 1920s to the way their work is aided by drones now. The transition should mark a present-day continuation of long-running research.

steps.title: Reject contrast cues
steps.content: Choice B signals comparison, Choice C suggests something remains true despite another fact, and Choice D signals contrast. The needed transition instead points to what is happening in the present. The answer is A.
